data.name: Again!? The Sheriff’s Kinky Justice
data.detailed_description:
A new case awaits the sheriff, packed with mystery, red herrings, and… girls?

A visual novel, point-and-click detective game with complete freedom of choice. A scorching Western atmosphere. Clues, booze, and attractive girls!

  • Over 110 images of girls in various poses and situations

  • 7 women to interrogate, each vying for the Sheriff’s attention

  • Complete freedom of action. Explore locations, find clues, and try to unravel this tangled web through interrogation! But remember, time is limited, keep an eye on the timer before the trial begins

  • Multiple endings. Accuse whoever you believe is guilty, just be sure to provide the necessary evidence

  • Don’t forget to have fun, you can always play with one hand

A gruesome murder has occurred in the mansion, leaving only two witnesses. The killer is skilled at concealing their appearance, leaving the Sheriff with virtually no useful information. He’ll have to solve this mystery on his own, using his wits and the clues scattered throughout the location.

Along the way, fate will lead the Sheriff to various places, each adding more arguments to the case. Furthermore, everyone has their own opinion about what happened.

The Sheriff doesn’t care about any of it. He’s not interested in this investigation. But a little bonus, in the form of a large sum of money, compels him to take action. Of course, the girls will never leave him in peace.

                                      Ashley

Ashley just happened to be in the wrong place at the wrong time. While she and the Sheriff know each other, they rarely spend time together. The Sheriff finds Ashley too boring and timid, although she’s had a few brushes with the law. Now, Ashley has to wait for the Sheriff’s decision; her future is entirely in his hands.

                                        Trish

A long-time acquaintance of the Sheriff. She’s always somewhere nearby. She constantly interferes with the Sheriff’s work, but the collaboration is mutual. Now, they’re destined to spend time together again, though the Sheriff will have to keep a closer eye on her than usual.

                                     Hannah

A fiercely independent woman. The Sheriff and she were strangers until now, but they’re about to become very well acquainted. Hannah is the antithesis of patient and compliant. He’ll need to tame her wild spirit before he can bring her under his control.

These lovely ladies, and others, are ready and waiting in the game! What’s stopping you?

data.short_description: A point-and-click detective visual novel where you’ll find clues and conduct interrogations. 7 girls, over 110 images, and multiple endings that depend on your choices! All of this awaits you in the game!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
